purpose: Defines UTF-8 integrity constraints for canonical artifacts and taskpack root files.

criteria.pass_logic: No BOM in canonical text artifacts.
criteria.warn_logic: Legacy BOM files are classified with remediation.
criteria.block_logic: New canonical or taskpack-root file contains BOM.
criteria.remediation_path: Rewrite file as UTF-8 no BOM and rerun filter.

criteria.pass_logic: No replacement character appears in canonical text.
criteria.warn_logic: Legacy replacement characters are tracked for cleanup.
criteria.block_logic: Replacement character appears in new canonical artifacts.
criteria.remediation_path: Repair source encoding and regenerate text.

criteria.block_logic: New canonical artifacts fail UTF-8 decode.
criteria.remediation_path: Normalize encoding to UTF-8 and remove mixed-byte artifacts.

next_action: Wire matrix to global filter and Astronomicon taskpack gate receipts.
